User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /.env*
Disallow: /private/

# Allow crawling of important content
Allow: /prolevel
Allow: /customize
Allow: /about
Allow: /privacy

# Crawl delay (optional - milliseconds per request)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location (generated by tools/generate_sitemap.js)
Sitemap: https://crazywithtool.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /
